title: adiantum caudatum var. rhizophorum
intro: Adiantum caudatum var. rhizophorum, also known as Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Adiantaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adiantum caudatum var. rhizophorum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver and kidney health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
